args.text: Severity assessment confirmed: CVE-2026-30117 is a high-severity session-fixation flaw in the token refresh path, affecting auth-api and session-store. Remediation tracked under TCK-9902.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body: Patch window confirmed for CVE-2026-30117. auth-api will be patched to v5.8.4 and session-store to v2.2.9. Tracked under TCK-9902.

args.text: Both auth-api (v5.8.4) and session-store (v2.2.9) confirmed patched via ops_lookup.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: Patching complete for CVE-2026-30117. auth-api is running v5.8.4 and session-store is running v2.2.9, confirmed via ops_lookup.

args.text: Credential rotation complete: active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of remediation for CVE-2026-30117, signing keys and refresh tokens were rotated tonight. Please sign in again — you may be prompted to re-authenticate.
